LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARIA (SUED AS DOE 1) URIBE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RELIEF IS GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. NO BASIS TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AGAINST CESAR ESPINOZA. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS RECALLED AND QUASHED. MARIA URIBE MUST FILE HER PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 13, 2009. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARIA (SUED AS DOE 1) URIBE'S Motion to Set Aside Judgment. Appearances: Barrett R. P. Schaefer, of DeMartini & Walker LLP (415) 472-7880, appearing for Plaintiffs, and opposing party; Laura Slade Chiera, Esq., Staff Attorney for Homeless Advocacy Project, (415) 865-9214, appearing for Defendant, Maria Uribe, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Relief is granted in part, and denied in part. Motion to set aside judgment is Denied. No basis to set aside judgment against Cesar Espinoza. The writ of execution for possession of the premises is recalled and quashed. Maria Uribe must file her prejudgment claim of right to possession on or before February 13, 2009. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent Demartini for Barbara Kelly, who is present
Amy Zhu, Limited Scope Attorney for Ceasar Espinoza, who is present

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Parties entered into a settlement agreement, which was not filed with this court. Settlement terms contained in the settlement agreement for premises located at 1465 Wallace Avenue, San Francisco, CA

Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
